response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role specifically requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems with compute/storage/hardware. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months) and no demonstrated cloud compute platform or distributed systems leadership at the scale required. Primary expertise is in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, not C++.
strengths: Long track record of senior engineering roles across diverse domains
Experience with low-latency, high-throughput services at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Demonstrated mentoring and teaching via workshops, talks, and courses
concerns: Does not meet the 8-year C++ requirement — only ~6 months of C/C++ at NI
No evidence of leading internal cloud compute platforms or large-scale distributed infrastructure
No formal technical leadership title; closest is Staff/Senior IC roles without team-lead scope

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / distributed systems leadership
Breadth of senior engineering and mentoring experience
